hooks.command: bash -lc 'cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null && exit 0; files=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -3 | paste -sd ", " -); count=$(git diff --cached --name-only | wc -l | tr -d " "); if [ "$count" -gt 3 ]; then files="$files +$((count-3)) more"; fi; scope=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -1 | awk -F/ "{print \$1\"/\"\$2}" | head -c 30); msg="chore(auto): ${files}"; git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m "$msg" --quiet 2>&1 | head -3 >&2 || true; echo "[auto-commit] $msg" >&2'
